rationale: The citing paper is an editorial/content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019) focused on journal-level topic/method diversity, and its stated prior-work linkage is to other historical JMR reviews rather than to the ghost-ad methodology paper. The only match evidence is a single DOI reference entry with no in-text citation context, suggesting this cited article is likely included as an example or item within the reviewed literature rather than used substantively for theory or methods in the editorial’s own analysis.
